title: Adversarial Networks Path
description: Build fluency in Adversarial Networks inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Part of speech
steps.summary: Part of speech belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Adversarial Networks. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Adversarial Networks. Compare it with Parts-of-Speech Tagging and Word Pair Inversion. It opens into Part-of-Speech Tagging and Part-of-Speech Tagging (POS).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Parts-of-Speech Tagging
